meta.notes: New domain — use wider thresholds initially. Recalibrate after 3 months of ranking data.

hero_keywords.description: Tier 1 — highest business value, monitor most aggressively

rules.name: Critical Ranking Drop — Tier 1 Keyword
rules.condition: Tier 1 keyword drops 10+ positions in any 7-day window
rules.action: Run ranking-drop-playbook immediately

rules.name: Moderate Ranking Drop — Tier 1 Keyword
rules.condition: Tier 1 keyword drops 5–9 positions in 7 days
rules.action: Investigate cause; check SERP changes and competitor content

rules.name: Critical Ranking Drop — Tier 2/3 Keyword
rules.condition: Any tracked keyword drops 10+ positions in 7 days
rules.action: Log and investigate pattern; check if algo-related

rules.name: Keyword Enters Top 10
rules.condition: Keyword moves from position >10 to position <=10
rules.action: Log win; consider adding internal links to boost further

rules.name: New Ranking Detected
rules.condition: Keyword starts ranking (was 'Not Ranking' / position > 100)
rules.action: Log to rank-history CSV; assess page 2 opportunity (RANK-007)

rules.name: Brand Keyword Drop
rules.condition: 'Rightway Systems' brand keyword drops below position 3
rules.action: Check for spam/scraper sites, review Google Business Profile

rules.name: Page 2 Opportunity — Easy Win
rules.condition: Keyword ranking positions 11–20 (page 2)
rules.action: Flag for content refresh or internal link boost. These are lowest-effort wins.

rules.name: ZATCA Keyword Leaves Top 5
rules.condition: Any ZATCA cluster keyword drops out of top 5 after previously being in top 5
rules.action: Run ZATCA Keyword Loss Playbook immediately

rules.name: Traffic Crash — Severe Drop
rules.condition: Total organic clicks drop >30% week-over-week
rules.action: Run Traffic Drop Playbook; check algorithm update tracker

rules.name: Traffic Warning — Moderate Drop
rules.condition: Total organic clicks drop 15–29% week-over-week
rules.action: Investigate source pages; check for crawl errors in GSC

rules.name: Impressions Collapse — Possible Crawl Issue
rules.condition: Total impressions drop >40% week-over-week
rules.action: Crawl site immediately; check robots.txt and sitemap; run Coverage report in GSC

rules.name: CTR Drop — Possible Meta Tag Issue
rules.condition: Average CTR drops >20% week-over-week
rules.action: Review title tags and meta descriptions; check if SERP features changed (ads, snippets)

rules.name: Three-Week Declining Trend
rules.condition: Organic traffic declines for 3 consecutive weeks (any amount)
rules.action: Conduct full content audit; identify declining pages; assess competitor content

rules.name: 404 Error Spike
rules.condition: New 404 errors spike: >20 new 404s detected in Google Search Console
rules.action: Identify broken URLs; set up 301 redirects; check for accidental file moves in deployment

rules.name: Crawl Errors Detected
rules.condition: New crawl errors appear in GSC Coverage report
rules.action: Run Crawl Error Playbook; check server logs for 5xx patterns

rules.name: Sitemap Error
rules.condition: Sitemap fails to fetch or returns errors in GSC
rules.action: Re-validate sitemap XML; check hosting for file access; re-submit in GSC

rules.name: Core Web Vitals Degradation
rules.condition: CWV report shows pages moving from 'Good' to 'Needs Improvement' or 'Poor'
rules.data_source: Google Search Console → Core Web Vitals
rules.action: Run PageSpeed Insights; identify specific metric (LCP, INP, CLS); escalate to dev team

rules.name: Index Coverage Drop
rules.condition: Number of indexed pages drops >10% from previous week
rules.action: Check robots.txt; check for accidental noindex tags; re-submit sitemap

rules.name: Manual Action or Security Issue
rules.condition: GSC shows manual action notification or security issue
rules.data_source: Google Search Console → Manual Actions / Security
rules.action: Read full GSC message; remediate issue; file reconsideration request if manual penalty

rules.name: Competitor Enters Top 3 — Hero Keyword
rules.condition: A known or new competitor appears in positions 1–3 for any Tier 1 keyword
rules.action: Analyze competitor page: content depth, backlinks, schema. Update own page to outcompete.

rules.name: New Competitor Page Targeting ZATCA Terms
rules.condition: A new domain/page appears ranking for ZATCA cluster keywords that wasn't there before
rules.action: Immediately audit new competitor page. Check content gaps. Strengthen ZATCA landing page content and schema.

rules.name: Competitor Content Update on Shared Topic
rules.condition: Google Alerts fires for competitor publishing/updating content on target keywords
rules.action: Review their new content. Identify any gaps to address in your own content calendar.

rules.name: Page 2 Cluster — ZATCA
rules.condition: Any ZATCA keyword ranking position 11–20
rules.action: Highest priority easy win. Refresh content, add FAQ schema, build 1–2 internal links to target page.

rules.name: Page 2 Cluster — ERP/LMS
rules.condition: Any ERP or LMS keyword ranking position 11–20
rules.threshold: position >= 11 AND position <= 20 AND keyword_cluster IN ['ERP','LMS']
rules.action: Refresh content on target page; add internal links; consider a supporting blog post.

rules.name: Featured Snippet Opportunity
rules.condition: Keyword ranking position 1–5 and no featured snippet currently claimed by Rightway
rules.action: Add direct answer format (40–60 word definition block), numbered list, or table to page targeting the snippet format.

rules.name: People Also Ask (PAA) Box Opportunity
rules.condition: PAA questions detected in SERP for tracked keyword not already answered in content
rules.action: Add FAQ section to target page answering the detected PAA question. Use FAQ schema markup.

rules.name: Quick Win — Low Competition Keyword Ranking 21–50
rules.condition: Low-competition keyword (marked L in research) ranking 21–50
rules.action: Improve on-page SEO: H2 with keyword, internal link, meta description refresh.

secondary_channel.note: Manual escalation — forward URGENT and ALERT emails to WhatsApp group immediately

google_analytics.notes: Configure GA4 if not done. Link to GSC for full funnel view.

manual_rank_tracking.tool: Google Search Console (free) + manual spot checks
